youtube.productionHours: 8 to 20 hours for a dedicated video, often higher if scripting and review cycles are heavy

tiktok.productionHours: 3 to 8 hours for a paid short-form brief, more if revisions or usage rights are broad

instagram.productionHours: 3 to 10 hours depending on whether the deal includes Stories, Reels, feed posts, or hybrid bundles

scenarioRules.gifted_only: Treat gifted-only deals as realistic only when product value, audience fit, and production burden stay clearly bounded.
scenarioRules.affiliate_only: Treat affiliate-only offers as risky by default unless product fit, payout per conversion, and historical audience response are unusually strong.
scenarioRules.usage_rights: When usage rights or whitelisting appear, make the hidden cost concrete instead of describing it abstractly.
scenarioRules.exclusivity: Broad exclusivity should feel expensive in the article logic, even when the brand wording sounds casual.

voiceRules: Prefer realistic ranges and tradeoffs over precise-looking but unsupported numbers.
If you use a scenario, make the setup and outcome feel plausible for the stated platform and creator tier.
Do not let every scenario sound like a best-case win; include friction, uncertainty, or downside when appropriate.
